batch_title: Cozy Life Sim: Customize, Build, and Explore in Heartopia

source_videos.title: WATCH THIS BEFORE YOU PLAY HEARTOPIA! Complete Guide for Full Release

final_summary_text: tldr: Heartopia is a free-to-play cozy life simulation game (Video: I'm OBSESSED with this game!!⭐Heartopia) featuring deep customization, multiplayer co-building, and five core hobbies—fishing, gardening, bug catching with a bubble wand, bird watching with photo scoring, and cooking with burnable dishes (Video: WATCH THIS BEFORE YOU PLAY HEARTOPIA!). You can fully customize homes internally and externally, adopt uniquely-featured pets, explore diverse biomes with dynamic weather, and complete daily/weekly resident requests to upgrade your guild level—all without paywall-blocked core mechanics, though seasonal gacha banners are available (Video: WATCH THIS BEFORE YOU PLAY HEARTOPIA!).
